nl_query: Show all scanner devices registered at the Main Campus that are active and have scanned at least one script.
failed_sql:
SELECT sd.id, sd.device_id, sd.device_name, sd.last_seen_at, sd.registered_at
FROM   scanner_device sd
JOIN   academic_unit au ON au.id = sd.campus_id
WHERE  au.unit_type = 'CAMPUS' AND au.code = 'MAIN'
  AND  sd.is_active = TRUE
  AND  sd.id IN (SELECT device_id FROM scan_history WHERE script_id IN (SELECT id FROM answer_script))
ORDER  BY sd.device_name;
error: Validation failed (schema): Ambiguous column reference: 'id'. It exists in multiple tables (scan_history, scanner_device, answer_script, academic_unit). You must qualify it with a table alias.
